phases.description: Core Django ERP: party master, finance (invoices, payments, opening balances), production (challans), reporting, Excel import pipeline, governance (approvals, audit, backups).
phases.label: PHASE 1
phases.name: Foundation

phases.description: Next.js production analytics dashboard: daily production chart, monthly invoice summary, top parties by revenue. Connects to Django JSON API endpoints at /reports/api/production/.
phases.label: PHASE 2
phases.name: Dashboard

phases.description: Automated tests, invoice-payment settlement allocation, richer production model, deployment polish.
phases.label: PHASE 3
phases.name: Hardening
